name: crawlberg
description: Web crawling and scraping with HTML→Markdown and headless-Chrome fallback.

interface.shortDescription: Crawl and scrape sites to clean markdown
interface.longDescription: Scrape single pages, crawl entire sites, or map a domain's URLs through the local crawlberg CLI. Every page is converted to clean Markdown via the built-in HTML→Markdown engine. WAF-blocked or JS-heavy pages transparently fall back to a headless Chrome backend.
